testcase.name: Story 3.4 - P0: Real-Time Display Critical Path › P0-E2E-002: Should update without loading state or visual flicker

error.message: page.evaluate: SecurityError: Failed to read the 'localStorage' property from 'Window': Access is denied for this document.
